one_line_summary: Complete and concurrency-safe implementation with perfect hidden-suite results, but docs/tests/API details are a bit rough.
strengths: Atomic Redis Lua backend and locked in-memory backend avoid lost updates.
Implements all requested surfaces: two algorithms, two backends, decorator, and ASGI middleware.
weaknesses: ADR/design docs contain inconsistencies from midstream algorithm changes and are not especially thorough.
Middleware headers are not fully spec-conventional and fail-open behavior is undocumented/configured loosely.
Property/integration tests are fairly shallow, and session log shows some test-run/debugging uncertainty.
